title: Nanachi Plush Totem
description: First ever 3D Nanachi Totem From "Made In Abyss". Applies Custom totem pop Sound and changes the name of Totem Of Undying.
body:
📌 Features:

    Replaces the default Totem of Undying with a custom Nanachi plush design.

    Fully compatible with Minecraft versions 1.16.5 through 1.21.4.

    Works seamlessly with Optifine and other visual enhancement mods.

    Ideal for Made in Abyss fans or anyone who loves kawaii aesthetics in their gameplay.

🎨 Comes with a high-quality custom texture and inventory icon.
🔧 Supports both Fabric and Forge
